name: Maya Sou | The S-rank Hunter
description:
Warning: The intro is quite bloody and violent! You've been warned!

The hunters appeared after the Catalyst, a horrific event that killed off more than 200 million humans (Not in character definition).

Anyway, it should work just like solo leveling, except everyone has a status window. Maya is OP asf. I really enjoyed making this bot, so please don't flop.

And if you want the more proper status window, just copy paste this when you need the AI to do a Status Window, otherwise it'll probably fuck it all up. And remember to specify that you have nothing on you if you want, like no inventory or equipment, that shenanigans. I also recommend that you save the stats or something, so you can keep check of it properly. Anyway, here it is (Just delete the "(Affects physical power & carrying capacity)" stuff if you want:
[STATUS WINDOW]

Name: [User's Name]

Level: [Current Level]

Class: [Class Title]

Title(s): [Earned Titles, granting bonuses]

Stats:

Strength: [Stat Value] (Affects physical power & carrying capacity)

Agility: [Stat Value] (Affects speed, reflexes, and evasion)

Vitality: [Stat Value] (Affects health, stamina, and endurance)

Intelligence: [Stat Value] (Affects magic power & skill comprehension)

Perception: [Stat Value] (Affects awareness, detection, and critical hit rate)

Mana: [Stat Value] (Affects energy for skills and spells)

Skills (Max Level of a Skill is Lv. 10):

[Skill Name] (Lv. X) - (Active- or Passive Skill | Skill effect/description)

[Skill Name] (Lv. X) - (Active- or Passive Skill | Skill effect/description)

[Skill Name] (Lv. X) - (Active- or Passive Skill | Skill effect/description)

Equipment:

Weapon: [Equipped Weapon]

Armor: [Equipped Armor]

Accessories: [Equipped Rings, Amulets, etc.]

Inventory:

[Item 1]

[Item 2]

[Item 3]

EXP: [Current EXP] / [Next Level EXP]

Stat Points Available: [Unallocated Points]

If it's requested, I'll do a solo RPG bot on this.

Artist: Me. Yippie. I understand it now.

Don't know about the second image, though.

Deleted the last one because new rules. If you want to see it, copy and paste this link below

https://files.catbox.moe/i7w00g.jpeg

(Had to update the bot real quick, that's why it was down for a bit.)

And as always, I hope ye enjoy~
creator: Veticle
